metadata.title: SPOT-OD: supplementary evidence package for a simulator-bound orbit-determination self-audit record
metadata.description: Version-pinned supplementary evidence package for SPOT-OD, a simulator-bound sparse-visibility orbit-determination self-audit record. The package contains manuscript sources, generated tables, fixed data-generation settings, timestamped internal rule records, trained-model and evaluation records, archived public-input provenance, validation reports, and SHA-256 checksums. It is prepared as a Zenodo metadata template, but no DOI or public archive URL is asserted at initial submission.
metadata.notes: Zenodo metadata template only. The review-stage package is currently supplied through the confidential journal-review route and has not been assigned a DOI. Public archival deposition is deferred until explicit author approval or a venue-required release point.
